body:
Jason,

I'm reading Section 4 tonight. The site-monitoring language reads clean but I want to align on the enrollment-halt criteria wording before we submit. Can we hold 20 minutes tomorrow after your clinic wraps?

Amanda pulled the updated 340-of-500 numbers and I'll fold those in. The October 1 deadline gives us a real cushion for once.

Jim
snippet:
Jason,

I'm reading Section 4 tonight. The site-monitoring language reads clean ...
subject: IRB renewal — Section 4 language

body:
Jim,

Tomorrow after 5 PM ET works. I'll bring the annotated PDF and Amanda's latest enrollment snapshot. Section 4 was where we tripped up on the last renewal — glad we're catching it early this cycle.

Jason
snippet:
Jim,

Tomorrow after 5 PM ET works. I'll bring the annotated PDF and Amanda's la...

body:
Jason,

Gerald Foster's cardiac surgery consult came back yesterday. Surgeon's comfortable either way given his STS score, but flagged the porcelain aorta on CT as a mark against SAVR. I lean TAVR, want your read before we set the family conversation.

Ravi
snippet:
Jason,

Gerald Foster's cardiac surgery consult came back yesterday. Surgeon's c...
subject: Foster case — TAVR vs SAVR

body:
Ravi,

Agreed on TAVR given the porcelain findings. Let's confirm valve sizing off the pre-op CT and get the anesthesia team in the loop before we set the family meeting. I can be available Tuesday afternoon between clinic and the fellows' journal club.

Jason
snippet:
Ravi,

Agreed on TAVR given the porcelain findings. Let's confirm valve sizing o...
subject: Re: Foster case — TAVR vs SAVR

body:

Ravi

body:

Karen

subject: Dorothy's BP tonight

body:

Jason

body:
Hey Dad,

Did a UWorld block this afternoon and dropped 8 points from last Sunday. Cardiology block, of all things. Feeling defeated. Am I peaking too early?

Kyle
snippet:
Hey Dad,

Did a UWorld block this afternoon and dropped 8 points from last Sunda...
subject: Step 2 practice score dropped

body:
Kyle — that plateau is textbook. Fellowship year I dipped in April before Boards and thought I was cooked. It broke by mid-May. Push through the plateau, don't chase the number.

Want to talk it through Sunday at 7?

Dad
snippet: Kyle — that plateau is textbook. Fellowship year I dipped in April before Boards...
subject: Re: Step 2 practice score dropped

body:

Kyle
snippet: Yeah — Sunday 7 works. Want me to walk you through the cardiology questions I mi...
subject: Re: Step 2 practice score dropped

body:

Dad
snippet: That'd be great — I'll grab a coffee and we'll go through them. If you can scree...

body:
Deal. And thanks — needed to hear the plateau story.

Kyle

Deal. And thanks — needed to hear the plateau story.
